statements.impact_statement: As of the v0.7.2 release timestamp above, the maintainer is not aware of any CVE affecting either this package or its single direct runtime dependency (svgwrite 1.4.3). This statement is a floor, not a ceiling: it will be superseded by per-CVE statements when any future vulnerability report is triaged. Consumers requiring a continuously-updated VEX should subscribe to the project's GitHub Security Advisories.
